1. Run: `git checkout RECO-799-fix-eslint-style-copurchase-model`
2. Search for test files matching "style-copurchase" or "copurchase" in src/unit-tests/ and test/
3. Run any matching tests with: `npx dotenv -e .env.test -- npx jest --config ./test/jest-unit.config.ts -- copurchase`
4. If tests fail, read the failures, fix the test assertions to match new named param signatures, then rerun
5. If you make fixes, commit with --no-verify and push with --no-verify
6. Also run: `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | head -20`
7. Switch back to main: `git checkout main`

Commit message format: "RECO-799: fix tests\n\nCo-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>"
